hooks.command: git diff --cached --name-only 2>/dev/null | grep -qx 'lib/frijolero/version.rb' || jq -n '{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"PreToolUse",additionalContext:"Reminder: lib/frijolero/version.rb is not in the staged changes. Ask the user if they want to bump the version before proceeding (docs-only/fixup commits may skip)."},systemMessage:"Version bump check: lib/frijolero/version.rb is not staged."}'
